title: InstantSleep
description: Right-click a bed to instantly skip to morning — no waiting, no sleep percentage required
body:
## InstantSleep

**Right-click a bed to instantly skip to morning — no waiting, no sleep percentage required.**

### How it works

In vanilla Minecraft you have to wait for all (or a percentage of) players on the server to sleep before the night ends. With InstantSleep, the moment you right-click a bed at night, time jumps straight to morning and all sleeping players are woken up automatically.

### Features

- Instant night skip — no sleep animation, no waiting
- Works in singleplayer and multiplayer
- Only activates at night — daytime right-clicks behave normally
- No configuration needed, works out of the box
